directive_verbatim: Resume 1000-Plan Cloud Factory design using L0 Graph First. Before drafting: 1. Run graph verifier. 2. Query graph for: cloud-factory, FACTORY_LINE_REGISTRY, p0-pgr, sandbox, client order, plan factory. 3. Produce compact file/subsystem map. 4. Only then draft the 1000-Plan package. Do not spawn broad reader agents. Do not exceed token budget without founder approval. Do not code. Do not deploy. Do not enable cron. Required deliverables: 1. PLAN_FACTORY_ARCHITECTURE_v1.md 2. PLAN_SCHEMA_v1.json 3. PLAN_LIBRARY_SEED_1000_v1.json 4. PLAN_RANKING_ROI_MODEL_v1.json 5. PLAN_FACTORY_ACTIVATION_PLAN_v1.md. Use Cloud Factory Substrate v0 as base. STOP after receipt.
